name: Isle of Wight (United Kingdom)
description: A horizontal bicolour of white over blue with the Isle of Wight coat of arms (three diamond-shaped lozenges) at the centre.
history: Adopted by the Isle of Wight Council in 2009 following a public competition; replaced an older 'islander' flag.

features.role: Coat of arms with three diamond-shaped lozenges
features.symbolism: from the historic arms of the Isle of Wight
